function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "dispatch_guard", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": 0.3, "adjustment_reasons": ["E3 confirmed threat level warrants response", "Novel incident - no precedent history to reduce confidence", "Board load is 0 - operator has bandwidth to handle this"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.67, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If guard reports back that the door is intact and the sensor was a malfunction, I'd reassess to E0-E1 and log as false alarm. If security footage shows an actual forced entry, would escalate to E4 and involve law enforcement via operator confirmation.\""}
